pathStyleHint: Use path-style access (bucket in path instead of domain)
prefixHint: Directory prefix in bucket, e.g. siyuan-backup/
backupHint: Backup will upload files to S3 one by one
backupHintLocal: Backup will be packed as data-*.zip saved to local backup directory
backupHintBoth: Will pack local ZIP first then upload to S3
downloadToLocalSuccess: Backup downloaded to local backup directory, extract manually to restore
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
confirmRestore: Download this backup to local backup directory? You'll need to extract manually to restore.
s3BackupDesc: Backup workspace to S3-compatible storage, supports local ZIP + S3 upload
useDateFolderHint: When checked, files are stored under a date folder (e.g. siyuan-backup/20260706-012735/). When unchecked, files go directly under the prefix
backupModeHint: Both options can be selected, local ZIP and S3 upload will run sequentially
localZipHint: Pack as data-*.zip saved to workspace data-backup/ directory
s3UploadHint: Upload files one by one to S3-compatible storage (requires S3 configuration)
autoBackupEnabledHint: Auto backup is enabled, will run at the configured frequency
autoBackupDisabledHint: Enable to automatically backup workspace at the configured frequency
localBackupDirDesc: Which folder to save ZIP archives locally
localBackupDirHint: Where local ZIP backup files are stored, relative to workspace root
s3SubPathDesc: Path segment appended after the directory prefix when uploading to cloud
s3SubPathHint: Organize backup files under this path segment when uploading to cloud
dropHint: Drop files here to compute SHA-256
